rationale: The response cites real projects but commits survivorship bias: it observes four practices across three successful projects and concludes these practices 'should' predict success, without examining failed or abandoned formalisation attempts. Presents speculation as fact while entirely omitting the denominator.
rubric_evidence: These four practices appear in every successful project. Therefore, any future formalisation project that adopts this methodology should succeed.
analysis restricted to three successful flagship projects with no counter-evidence or failed cases examined
